title: Morfonica in Minecraft
description: Decorative dolls for Morfonica band in BanGDream project.
body:
# Morfonica in Minecraft

This mod added some decorative blocks inspired by members of the **Morfonica** band in the BanGDream project.
![Decorative Blocks of Morfonica Band Members](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6efadb6548aa6d5ce0aff25647835577a5c072c.png)

## Features
- Exquisite modeling blocks, will add color to your architecture or landscape.
- All blocks have configurable recipes (can modify enable/disable recipes in config file).
- All models are built by native Blockbench, not need any plugins.
- The textures for all characters can override with Resource Packs.
